description_long: This is a modern two-story brick house surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and a grassy yard. The house features a black gable roof with multiple solar panels installed on top, and a mix of large and small windows distributed across its facade. The front of the house includes a paved driveway with a metal gate, a small porch with a pergola, and an outdoor seating area with a hot tub. On one side, there is a covered carport and a balcony with glass railings, while the backyard is open and spacious, with a few decorative plants and a dog visible. The exterior materials include dark red brick, glass, metal, and wood, giving the house a contemporary yet welcoming appearance. The property is well-maintained, with clear boundaries and functional outdoor spaces for relaxation and utility.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a black gable roof, solar panels, and a mix of outdoor living spaces, surrounded by a manicured hedge and grassy yard.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the backyard, highlighting the pergola-covered patio, hot tub, and a large grassy area enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_1: This side view shows the covered carport, a side door, and the full height of the gable roof with solar panels.
description_view_2: The front view displays the driveway, metal gate, main entryway, and a balcony with glass railings above the garage.
description_view_3: This angle reveals the paved driveway, side balcony, and the arrangement of outdoor seating and utility areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, pergola, and adjacent paved driveway with a metal gate.
